user_query: I want to surprise my friends with a trivia night. Can you give me details about a random Roman God? Also, I'd like to know the estimated total population of India. Additionally, could you provide me with the English name and population of all countries in the world? Finally, can you help me find some classes to learn interesting facts for the trivia night? Thank you!

TaskList.description: Retrieve details about a random Roman God.
Get the estimated total population of India.
Fetch the English name and population of all countries in the world.
Find classes or resources to learn interesting facts for trivia night.
